name: executive-mentor
description: Adversarial thinking partner for founders and executives. Stress-tests plans, prepares for board meetings, navigates hard decisions, and forces honest post-mortems.
author: Alireza Rezvani

skills.name: challenge
skills.description: Pre-mortem analysis. Find weaknesses in any plan before reality does.
skills.example: /em:challenge Our Q3 go-to-market plan targeting enterprise customers

skills.name: board-prep
skills.description: Prepare for board meetings. Anticipate hard questions. Know your numbers cold.
skills.example: /em:board-prep Q3 review: missed revenue target, new product roadmap, hiring plan

skills.name: hard-call
skills.description: Framework for decisions with no good options. Layoffs, pivots, firings.
skills.example: /em:hard-call Whether to fire co-founder who hasn't been performing for 6 months

skills.name: stress-test
skills.description: Challenge any business assumption. Revenue projections, moats, market size.
skills.example: /em:stress-test We'll reach $2M ARR by end of Q4 with current conversion rates

skills.name: postmortem
skills.description: Honest analysis of what went wrong. 5 Whys done properly.
skills.example: /em:postmortem We lost our largest customer after 18 months

agents.name: devils-advocate
agents.description: Adversarial thinker that systematically finds weaknesses. Always 3 concerns, always rated, always mitigated.

scripts.name: decision_matrix_scorer
scripts.description: Weighted decision analysis with sensitivity testing. Which option wins and how fragile is that result.

scripts.name: stakeholder_mapper
scripts.description: Map stakeholders by influence and alignment. Find champions, blockers, swing votes.
